blended.narrative: Eldora is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.5 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 8,187 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total. Strong winds with gusts to 41 mph may cause lift holds.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: overcast, highs of 48°F, gusts to 41 mph.
Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 9" over the past week. Current depth: 33".
